title: PaymentReceived
description: Published when a payment has been received and captured for an order.

orderId.description: Identifier of the order the payment is for.

userId.description: Identifier of the customer who placed the order.

paymentMethod.description: Method used to take the payment (e.g. card, PayPal).

paymentStatus.description: Status of the payment after capture.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 time the payment was received.
